before_state: BLUFF + 6.H VIOLATION — pre-existing test asserted on 'Account' → 'Sign in' → 'Logged in' which don't exist in the current UI, AND shipped real RUTRACKER credentials in a `private object BuildConfigBridge` placeholder (recorded in incident 2026-05-04-bridge-credentials.json). Both bluffs already removed in commits 32706b8 + 356dd00 (BuildConfig wiring); this commit completes the test redesign.
after_state: PASSING on CZ_API34_Phone (API 34) with real network round-trip to rutracker.org. Test drives the REAL onboarding flow: Select Provider → tap RuTracker.org → enter creds (BuildConfig.RUTRACKER_USERNAME/PASSWORD from .env) → tap Sign in → wait for nav → Search tab shows 'Search history' empty state.

rehearsal.baseline_outcome: BUILD SUCCESSFUL — Finished 1 tests on CZ_API34_Phone(AVD) - 14 (real network round-trip ~1m18s)
rehearsal.mutation: in feature/login/src/main/kotlin/lava/login/ProviderLoginViewModel.kt: comment out the `authService.signalAuthorized(name = state.usernameInput.value.text)` call inside the AuthResult.Success branch.
rehearsal.mutation_outcome: BUILD FAILED — androidx.compose.ui.test.ComposeTimeoutException: Condition still not satisfied after 30000 ms — the test cannot find 'Search history' because the legacy AuthService SharedFlow never receives the bridge signal; SearchViewModel sees Unauthorized; the Search tab renders 'Authorization required to search' instead.
rehearsal.reverted_outcome: BUILD SUCCESSFUL on retry (first post-revert run hit a flaky SocketTimeoutException to rutracker.org — network noise, not a code regression)

credential_handling.skip_when_missing: Test uses Assume.assumeTrue to skip when BuildConfig values are empty (CI without secrets, fresh clones). Skipped is visible in the test report and does NOT count as PASS.

scope_limits.what_test_does_NOT_assert: Test stops at the main app's Search-history empty state. It does NOT search rutracker.org or assert on result rows. The original C2 asserted on 'seeders' + 'MB' result row content; that portion is deferred to a separate test that uses the bypass rule (avoiding the deep-nav teardown bug) once the search-result UI is structurally verified.
scope_limits.anti_bluff_note: The test exercises the FULL credentialed login flow including the real network round-trip. Falsifiability mutation reveals the layer-3 AuthService bridge as the load-bearing seam — without it the legacy auth observation path doesn't update.

matrix_run_owed: Single-AVD rehearsal on CZ_API34_Phone (API 34). Per clause 6.I, the gating matrix run requires API 28, 30, 34, latest-stable, and at least one tablet form factor. Network-dependent — flaky AVDs may need retry.
